purpose: Validate YAML files without launching a device or browser
notes: Treat valid:false as an authoring bug

purpose: List discovered test files and command indexes
agent_use: Use before rerunning a failed command index
notes: Do not count command indexes manually

purpose: Print bundled Lumi YAML JSON Schema
agent_use: Use when command shape or selector fields are unclear
notes: Guardrail only; schema is permissive, so confirm exact fields in command references

agent_use: Use before first run and when runtime dependencies fail
notes: Run separately for android android_auto ios web macos and windows when doing platform coverage checks

purpose: List connected devices for a platform
agent_use: Use before choosing a target mobile Android Auto or local desktop target
notes: For desktop this reports the local host target

agent_use: Run full flows and minimal failing command reruns
Use when reports need to be regenerated from saved results
notes: Usually run already creates reports with --report

purpose: Start web inspector for visual test creation
agent_use: Use for unfamiliar UI and selector discovery
notes: Long-running server; stop it after use

purpose: Record user interactions and generate YAML
agent_use: Use when user wants to capture a manual Android flow

purpose: Install AI agent integrations and skill files
agent_use: Use after package install so Codex can discover the skill
notes: One-line AI installers call this automatically

agent_use: Use only when an interactive debugging shell is explicitly useful
notes: Interactive command; prefer validate/list/run for automation

purpose: Manage local system components and drivers
agent_use: Use when setting up missing dependencies after doctor identifies gaps
notes: May install tools; prefer doctor first
